_comment: The roster of people. SOURCE OF TRUTH for who is in the sweep. Only entries with "paid": true are included in the draw (scripts/draw.js) AND on the live leaderboard — unpaid people never appear in either. The pre-season tracker shows EVERYONE here with a Paid / Not yet badge. Fields: name (must match picks.json exactly), id (unique slug, lowercase-no-spaces), paid (true|false). amount and datePaid are optional record-keeping and are NEVER published (only name + paid reach the public roster.json). Add a line per person as they sign up; flip paid to true once they've paid.
